name: Hotline Miami
short_description: Hotline Miami is a high-octane action game overflowing with raw brutality, hard-boiled gunplay and skull crushing close combat.
detailed_description:
Hotline Miami is a high-octane action game overflowing with raw brutality, hard-boiled gunplay and skull crushing close combat. Set in an alternative 1989 Miami, you will assume the role of a mysterious antihero on a murderous rampage against the shady underworld at the behest of voices on your answering machine. Soon you'll find yourself struggling to get a grip of what is going on and why you are prone to these acts of violence.

Rely on your wits to choreograph your way through seemingly impossible situations as you constantly find yourself outnumbered by vicious enemies. The action is unrelenting and every shot is deadly so each move must be quick and decisive if you hope to survive and unveil the sinister forces driving the bloodshed. Hotline Miami’s unmistakable visual style, a driving soundtrack, and a surreal chain of events will have you question your own thirst for blood while pushing you to the limits with a brutally unforgiving challenge.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Polish

reviews.review_text: One of the most intuitive games I've ever played. It is designed for the sole purpose of fun and that shows. I kept playing wishing the levels never ended. So many different cool death animations for different weapons, fun masks to collect and a great socio-political commentary underneath its story. GOATed game.
Banging music, fun gameplay, decent story too

Hotline Miami may be hands down the best franchise I have ever had the grace of experiencing. From the brutal and addicting gameplay to the complexity and layers of each chapters story, this game is nothing short from perfection. Its bloody. Its vulgar. But damnit does it feel good to mow down swarms of russians with nothing but a baseball bat and a throwing knife. Perfection
